extra.reason: Phase A complete. Doc edits: wild/CLAUDE.md (§1, §10 rewritten + new §11), wild-hook-ops/CLAUDE.md (Status added), wild-rails-safe-introspection-mcp/CLAUDE.md (Archetype added), wild-hook-ops/000-docs/* (6 files renamed to NNN-CC-ABCD shape), wild/000-docs/009-AT-AUDT-... audit report filed, wild/000-docs draft files moved to wild/notes/. Top-level wild-rails-safe-introspection-mcp duplicate fast-forwarded and deleted (origin had everything; nested clone retained .beads). 2 commits pushed: wild-hook-ops@c8e9cd7, wild-rails-safe-introspection-mcp@4f73283.

Phase B complete. 10/10 appaudits filed at wild/<repo>/000-docs/NNN-AT-AUDT-appaudit-2026-05-28.md, total ~38K words (range 3,100-4,400 per repo). Spawned via 10 docs-architect subagents in parallel, transcript-pipeline retry needed after watchdog stall on first attempt. All 10 commits pushed to origin/main on each repo. Cross-repo findings extracted: hook-ops adoption gap, branch-pin supply-chain risk, capability-gate Rule 5 audit gap, WildcardMatcher contract drift, data-contract drift (source_id + outcome_distribution), 3-gem data-pipeline doc fiction, CapabilityGate v1 stub in rails-introspection, missing wst CLI for gap-miner operator guide. These are filed as separate beads under Phase F.

Phase D complete. Created public repo jeremylongshore/wild-rails-ai-ops with README + ARCHITECTURE.md + CLAUDE.md + governance files (CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY, CODE_OF_CONDUCT) + LICENSE. Description set, topics applied (wild-ecosystem, rails, ruby, mcp, ai-agents). intent-solutions-io/.github/profile/README.md updated to feature Wild Ecosystem entry under Production Systems (commit a4e17b6).

Phase E complete. All 10 wild-* repos polished: descriptions set (2 were empty: session-telemetry + permission-analyzer); topics applied (wild-ecosystem + ruby-gem + 1-2 specific per repo); branch protection on main (no force-push, no deletions); v0.1.0 releases cut on the 2 that were missing (wild-admin-tools-mcp, wild-capability-gate); ecosystem callout added/updated in all 10 READMEs pointing to wild-rails-ai-ops umbrella. 10 commits pushed across the 10 repos (appaudit + README callout bundled per commit).
